name: Umang Pakistan
description: A dedicated, clinical mental health helpline offering free tele-counseling with clinical psychologists for suicide prevention and acute emotional distress.

name: Taskeen Health Initiative
description: An emotional support helpline offering mental health screening, active listening, and facilitated referrals to qualified psychiatrists/psychologists.

name: Karwan-e-Hayat
description: A prominent non-profit psychiatric care hospital in Karachi offering clinical diagnosis, pharmaceutical treatment, counseling, and inpatient rehabilitation.

name: Rozan Helpline
description: A toll-free helpline providing psychological support, counseling, and legal-medical referral services for women, youth, and children experiencing violence or distress.

name: Pakistan Association for Mental Health
description: A established psychiatric care clinic in Karachi offering subsidized clinical diagnostics, outpatient psychiatry sessions, and family counseling.
